metadata.notes: Asteroid spawn using RNG. Type: 0 - story, 1 - spawn single enemy. Action: 0 - stop asteroids, 0 - start asteroids

events.text:
SYSTEM ALERT:
Destination Locked | Kepler-268 Alpha

ADAM:
Recover the Helios Drive Crystal.
It enables stable energy output, forming the
Pacemaker’s primary power source.

Pilot:
Easy... sounds like a piece of ca-

ADAM:
Warning! Class-5 Asteroid Belt in high
orbit detected.

ADAM:
Maintain thruster control via [Arrow Keys].
Shoot with [SPACE]

ADAM:
Try not to scratch the paint. Good luck.
